creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
1. Out of date -- version 1.07 is the latest on the authors's web-site
	http://devplanet.fastethernet.net/gxedit.html
	2. The 1.07 left unpatched will look for the user's mailbox in
	/var/spool/mail/$USER -- patch-aa fixes that.
	3. The 1.07 and 1.06 left unpatched overwrite local settings for
	CC and CFLAGS -- patch-ab fixes that.

Fix: 

gxedit107-port.tar.gz is in the incoming ...
